lanes.scope: Independent goal/constraint re-review of US-431 after fixes on branch us-431-independent-closure-review.
commandsOrTools: GIT_MASTER=1 git diff -- scripts/closure-review-report.ts scripts/closure-review-output.ts scripts/closure-review.ts core/test/scripts/closure-review.test.ts spec/beta-1/prd.json
bunx biome check scripts/closure-review.ts scripts/closure-review-report.ts scripts/closure-review-output.ts core/test/scripts/closure-review.test.ts spec/beta-1/prd.json
direct bun validator probes for conclusive lanes, inconclusive classes, blocker behavior, and markdown retention
evidence: Goal lane approved: five required lanes are enforced and missing/duplicate lanes add errors.
Goal lane verified inconclusive classes timeout, empty-output, instructions-only, and no-repo-access prevent approval.
Goal lane verified blockers require fixed-and-re-reviewed evidence or an authoritative currently failing Beta story and still prevent closure approval while linked.
Goal lane verified PRD priority uniqueness: 72 stories, 72 unique priorities; US-432 priority 61.

findings.title: US-431 goal constraints are structurally enforced by the closure-review report validator.
US-432 closure priority duplicate was fixed and verified unique.

residualRisks: The lane did not run full bun test or live provider/container checks by instruction.
US-431 remains passes:false until final Build-step bookkeeping updates it.

lanes.scope: Independent hands-on QA re-review of the US-431 closure-review CLI and artifacts.
commandsOrTools: GIT_MASTER=1 git branch --show-current && GIT_MASTER=1 git status --short
real CLI exercise: bun run scripts/closure-review.ts --input <tmp>/input.json --report <tmp>/report.json --note <tmp>/note.md --prd <tmp>/prd.json
evidence: QA lane approved after a real temporary CLI run exited 0 and wrote non-empty JSON and Markdown artifacts.
Generated JSON had approved:true, five lanes, and zero errors; Markdown included approved:true plus qa and context-history approved lines.
Focused tests, typecheck, and lint exited 0 during QA re-review.
No QA temp artifacts were left in the repository.

findings.title: The closure-review CLI writes JSON and Markdown before returning approval status.
Root PRD priority uniqueness and US-431 priority were verified by QA.

residualRisks: QA used synthetic valid five-lane input for the real CLI surface; this retained artifact is the actual lane input.
QA did not run live provider/container commands or the full bun test suite by instruction.

lanes.scope: Independent code-quality re-review of the US-431 closure-review implementation after fixes.
commandsOrTools: codegraph source review for closure review modules and tests
awk pure LOC checks for the three production scripts
bunx biome check scripts/closure-review-report.ts scripts/closure-review-output.ts scripts/closure-review.ts core/test/scripts/closure-review.test.ts
evidence: Code-quality lane approved: prior blockers were re-reviewed as fixed.
scripts/closure-review-report.ts measured 227 pure LOC after splitting rendering/output into scripts/closure-review-output.ts.
Blocker findings cannot approve closure when unresolved or linked to still-failing Beta stories.
Markdown includes finding severity, source references, and resolution text.

findings.title: Production report module is below the 250 pure-LOC ceiling after the output split.
Blocker approval bypass is fixed and covered by focused tests.

residualRisks: Focused Bun test output was terse in the reviewer environment, so the lane relied on exit status plus local final verification output.
The lane did not stage files or inspect teammate sessions by instruction.

lanes.scope: Independent security re-review of US-431 closure-review trust boundaries after fixes.
commandsOrTools: GIT_MASTER=1 git diff -- scripts/closure-review.ts scripts/closure-review-report.ts scripts/closure-review-output.ts core/test/scripts/closure-review.test.ts spec/beta-1/prd.json
grep for closure-review, currentlyFailing, linked-beta-story, fixed-and-re-reviewed
focused bun -e probe against forged currentlyFailing
evidence: Security lane approved: no blocker findings after re-review.
Reviewer input currentlyFailing is ignored; failing-story authority comes from the PRD-derived set.
Blockers cannot approve while unresolved, linked to non-failing stories, linked to still-failing stories, or present in an approved lane.
Markdown and JSON outputs retain lane evidence, finding sources, and resolution evidence/rationale/sources.

findings.title: Closure-review input is fail-closed for missing/duplicate lanes, invalid dispositions, missing evidence, missing findings, residual-risk omissions, and inconclusive lanes.
Forged currentlyFailing claims do not control blocker-link authority.

residualRisks: The PRD file is trusted as authoritative for failing-story state.
The validator enforces submitted report structure and disposition semantics; it cannot prove reviewers disclosed every real blocker.

lanes.scope: Independent context/history mining review of Beta 1 closure artifacts and recent git history for US-430, US-431, and US-432.
inputs: recent git history for Beta 1 closure artifacts
commandsOrTools: grep for US-431, US-430, US-432, closure, blocker, inconclusive, review terms
jq over spec/beta-1/prd.json for US-430..US-443 state
GIT_MASTER=1 git show on recent closure commits touching prd/progress/spec artifacts
evidence: Context/history lane approved: no blocker found for retaining this lane as terminal review evidence.
US-431 remains correctly open before final Build bookkeeping; US-430 and US-432 are closed with source-backed progress evidence.
Remaining closure blockers are linked to currently failing stories US-433 through US-443 rather than dismissed.
Historical progress ties US-430 and US-432 fixes to immutable runtime and provider-matrix acceptance evidence.

findings.title: US-430 and US-432 prior blockers are fixed and recorded as complete.
Remaining Beta 1 closure blockers are carried by still-failing stories rather than dismissed.

residualRisks: The lane did not run tests, lint, typecheck, live provider commands, or container/runtime commands by instruction.
The branch contained untracked closure-review files during the read-only lane.
